calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Adrienne Short was present in pro per on behalf of herself, and as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor, Nicholas Short.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file. Order Dispensing with Notice to the minor's other parent re: the proposed name change, was submitted to and signed by the Court today, January 14, 2010.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Adrienne LaCome.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Nicholas LaCome.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
